mapper.select: SELECT ct.CT_NO AS ctNo , ct.COURSE_NO AS courseNo , ct.TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId , ct.CT_ORDER AS ctOrder , t.TRIP_NM AS tripNm , t.TRIP_ADDR AS tripAddr , t.TRIP_PATH_NM AS tripPathNm FROM COURSE_TRIP ct JOIN TRIP t ON ct.TRIP_CONTS_ID = t.TRIP_CONTS_ID WHERE ct.COURSE_NO = #{courseNo} ORDER BY ct.CT_ORDER ASC
SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId , TRIP_NM AS tripNm , TRIP_ADDR AS tripAddr , TRIP_PATH_NM AS tripPathNm FROM TRIP WHERE TRIP_CONTS_ID = #{tripContsId}

SELECT FILE_NO AS fileNo , FILE_CLSF AS fileClsf , FILE_PATH_NM AS filePathNm , FILE_NM AS fileNm , FILE_REG AS fileReg , FILE_REG_HM AS fileRegHm , BOARD_CLSF AS boardClsf , BOARD_ID AS boardId FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE BOARD_CLSF = #{boardClsf} AND BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY FILE_NO ASC
